posts.author: hrfacebuk
posts.community: Silkflex Polymers (India) Ltd : A make in India initiative
posts.text: Hi Sarthak, Good write up, I didn’t know that one existed here on VP. Silkflex reminds me a lot of SIRCA paints both listing scenario wise and business wise. Sirca paints mental model can be applied here. Sirca was also into similar sector with exclusive distributor rights and then manufacturing for some Italian MNC (can’t recollect the name now). Sirca had listed in 2018-2019 and once bear mkt got over in 2020 then moved up, similar thing here too (not that it means anything and just highlighting a technical commonality too). What I found out was that Bangladesh distributor (‘Silkflex Banglad…
